commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 27:2 Over the first division for the first month was Jashobeam the son of Zabdiel: and in his division were twenty and four thousand. Hebrew, "Jashobham "as chap. He was the first after Joab, (Haydock) and a descendant of Pharez, like David, and waiting upon the king in the month of Nisan, which almost agrees with our March (Menochius) and April. (Haydock) Zabdiel, the Hachmonite, may therefore denote his country; (Kennicott) or Zabdiel might be his ancestor, though the same man has frequently different names. We find several companions of this general in the sequel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
